// Source: https://github.com/profezzorn/ProffieOS/blob/master/config/common_presets.h
// Legacy ProffieOS — Gradient<base_low, base_high> base with Gradient<shim_low, shim_high> shimmer
// Two gradients composited: red-blue body with cyan-yellow shimmer
StyleNormalPtr<Gradient<RED,BLUE>,Gradient<CYAN,YELLOW>,300,800>()
